violations.text: Per interview of staff, utensils, dishware, and glassware are only washed, and rinsed. The surfaces of equipment that contacts time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as meats and cheeses, or is used as public dishware such as glasses or utensils must be washed, rinsed, and sanitized. Establishment is lacking Sanitizer- establishment is to purchase Quintenary Ammonia or chlorine for food contact surface sanitizing. Establishment is to purchase corresponding test strips to effectively measure the concentration of the sanitizer. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026

Establishment is lacking a 3 bay sink, a 3 bay sink must be installed to effectively wash, rinse, and sanitize using a food safe sanitizer measured with a corresponding test strip. Establishment is to use only single serve, dishware, utensils and drinkware until 3 bay sink is installed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2026
The ceiling in the kitchen is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2026
